<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking the green cell at (25, 42)
before_ascii = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
after_ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Changed cells:")
changes = []
for i in range(len(before_ascii)):
    if i < len(after_ascii):
        for j in range(len(before_ascii[i])):
            if j < len(after_ascii[i]):
                if before_ascii[i][j] != after_ascii[i][j]:
                    changes.append((i, j, before_ascii[i][j], after_ascii[i][j]))
for c in changes:
    print(f"  ({c[0]},{c[1]}): '{c[2]}' -> '{c[3]}'")

print("\nCurrent G/g objects:")
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('G', 'g'):
        boundary = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in boundary)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in boundary)
        print(f"  {n['color']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, top-left=({min_r},{min_c})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
